scope: Independent audit of plan-050-audit-semantic-conservation using latest verification
auditor_context: user-provided independent review in separate window
rationale: The reviewed plan, implementation, docs, tests, audit records, and latest verification align with the stated goals and exit criteria. audit bundle --json is read-only and includes semantic conservation plus J-flow/R-flow prompts; generated audit Markdown, templates, README, and quality signals document the reviewer lens; legacy audit loading remains backward-compatible through defaults; tests cover prompt content, JSON envelope output, and generated Markdown. No non-goal overreach or semantic commitment loss was found.
